title: Milestone Camping 96940 Emergency First Aid Kit / Compact and Portable Home or Travel Kit / Ideal for Camping, Family Days Out and More, Red
features: FIRST AID KIT - This 45-piece first aid kit is ideal for home or family use. Containing the essential items, it’s perfect to take away with you on trips or keep in the car for emergencies.

COMPACT AND PORTABLE – This lightweight first aid kit measures at 15 x 11 x 5.5 cm and its compact size allows you to discreetly store it away in your home, car, or workplace. It is also great to take away for use outdoors while camping, hiking, backpacking, and walking.

WHAT’S INSIDE – The kit includes 20 x adhesive plasters (7.6 x 1.9cm), 1 x triangular bandage (96 x 96 x 135cm), 2 x rubber gloves, 4 x alcohol free prep wipes, 1 x conforming bandage (7.5 x 4cm), 2 x sterile dressing pads (7.5 x 7.5cm), 7 x small safety pins, 4 x large safety pins, 2 x tape roll (1.25cm x 4.6M) and 1 x 9cm scissors.

VERSATILE – The kit comes in a reusable case that allows you to refill when required as well as add your own first aid accessories or medication. Organise the contents however you like, and access what you need, when you need it.
MILESTONE CAMPING – Milestone Camping is the leading manufacturer of everything you need to enjoy the great outdoors. Visit the Milestone Camping page on Amazon to view the whole range today.
description: From the manufacturer Portable Simple place in the car, in a bag or keep at home so you will always have some basic first aid accessories with you Compact Carry Case The case measures at 15 x 11 x 5.5 cm which allows you to take it wherever you need to without it taking up too much space Full stocked but also replenishable The reusable case allows you to refill when required as well as aid your own first aid accessories or medication Perfect for basic injuries, such as: Cuts Grazes Sprains Burns Small Wounds Included in the kit 2 x Sterile Dressing Pad Scissors 20 Adhesive Plasters 4 Alcohol Free Wipes 7 Small / 4 Large Safety Pins 2 x Tape Rolls 2 x Medium Gloves 1 x Conforming, 1 x Triangular Bandage
